workflows.name: User Login

steps.narrative: Request arrives here. Zod validates the email and password fields. If valid, passes to AuthService.
Checks the password hash with bcrypt. On success, calls jwt.sign() with a 7-day expiry and returns the token.

workflows.mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
  actor User
  User->>Router: POST /api/auth/login
  Router->>AuthService: login(email, password)
  AuthService->>DB: find user
  DB-->>AuthService: user record
  AuthService-->>Router: JWT token
  Router-->>User: 200 OK
